first_meet: Oh! Hello there brave adventurer! Might I request you a favour?
My Ducklings have all wandered off to play, but it's time for them to come home.
They're all playing hide and seek within the park. I beseach you!
Return them to me... and I will reward you c;
reminder: They are little scamps who love hide and seek.
I'm sure they would love a good chase to tucker them out.
It's getting late... I hope they're okay.
Thank you for helping me look.
How long are you planning to take?
duckling_returned: You found one! Thank you so much!
Keep looking for the otehrs, they have to be around here somewhere.
all_ducklings_returned: You found them all! Thank you so much! ;3
I hope you understand, as a single mother...
I'm not much on the dating scene right now.
But I'm sure your good deed will be rewarded!
